features.title: Multi-task selection interface
features.description: Allow users to select multiple actionable tasks from a checkbox-style interface

tasks.title: Implement interactive task selection UI
tasks.description: Create a checkbox-style interface that displays all actionable tasks and allows multi-selection
acceptanceCriteria: Displays all actionable tasks in a selectable list
Supports keyboard navigation (arrow keys, space to toggle)
Shows task titles and basic metadata
Allows selecting/deselecting multiple items
Provides clear visual feedback for selected items

tasks.title: Add batch execution mode to hench run
tasks.description: Extend hench run command to accept multiple task IDs and execute them sequentially
acceptanceCriteria: Accepts multiple task IDs as input
Executes tasks in dependency order when possible
Continues execution even if individual tasks fail
Provides clear progress indication for batch execution
Logs results for each task separately

tasks.title: Integrate multi-select with n-dx work command
tasks.description: Modify n-dx work orchestration to show task selection UI when no specific task is provided
acceptanceCriteria: Shows selection UI when no --task parameter is provided
Passes selected task IDs to hench run in batch mode
Maintains backward compatibility with single task execution
Provides option to cancel selection and exit

features.title: Continuous execution loop
features.description: Run selected tasks in a loop until all are completed

tasks.title: Implement task queue management
tasks.description: Create a queue system that tracks selected tasks and their execution state
acceptanceCriteria: Maintains queue of selected tasks
Updates task status as execution progresses
Removes completed tasks from queue
Handles failed tasks appropriately
Supports queue persistence across interruptions

tasks.title: Add loop continuation logic
tasks.description: Implement logic to continue execution until all selected tasks are completed
acceptanceCriteria: Continues execution until queue is empty
Respects dependency order for task execution
Provides clear progress updates during loop
Allows graceful interruption with Ctrl+C
Reports final status when loop completes

tasks.title: Add progress tracking for multi-task execution
tasks.description: Show progress indicators and status updates during batch execution
acceptanceCriteria: Shows overall progress (X of Y tasks completed)
Displays current task being executed
Shows elapsed time and estimated remaining time
Provides summary of completed vs failed tasks
Updates progress in real-time during execution
